hero_subtitle: SFTY streamlines KYC and KYB onboarding by integrating multiple identity providers into one seamless, auditable compliance workflow for digital asset businesses.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling

trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Onboarding slows when identity checks disconnect
problem_description: Compliance teams face delays when KYC and KYB identity verification results remain isolated across multiple providers. This fragmentation creates manual workload, inconsistent risk views and weak audit trails that complicate onboarding decisions for VASPs.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY links individual and corporate identity verification results into one structured onboarding workflow with risk-based routing, unified review status and audit-ready decision evidence for VASP compliance teams.
workflow_title: From identity checks to onboarding approval
workflow_description: SFTY connects multiple identity and company verification providers to structure onboarding reviews, route cases, preserve evidence and support final approval decisions.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented checks. One onboarding layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides a provider-neutral layer that connects KYC and KYB outputs into structured workflows, decisions, cases and audit-ready evidence for seamless onboarding orchestration.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASP compliance teams by orchestrating identity providers, preserving audit evidence and enabling controlled deployment for clearer due diligence and operational oversight.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY orchestrate multiple identity providers
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how onboarding workflows connect KYC and KYB data
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence supports onboarding decision reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Compare deployment models for secure provider orchestration
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP onboarding?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASPs a connected compliance layer that connects identity, corporate and risk providers into structured onboarding workflows with audit-ready decision records and evidence preservation.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY orchestrate identity providers?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes provider outputs based on risk, jurisdiction and client type to connect individual identity checks, corporate verification, sanctions screening and UBO reviews into one workflow.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve onboarding evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY records case history, decision logs and linked evidence to create a traceable, auditable trail for onboarding reviews and compliance reporting.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY connect with existing KYC providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY integrates with selected KYC and KYB providers without replacing them, structuring their outputs into a controlled onboarding workflow.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace current identity verification providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above identity verification providers, connecting their results into structured workflows rather than replacing them.
final_title: Structure identity provider workflows with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY connects KYC and KYB providers into streamlined onboarding, risk-based reviews, and audit-ready decision records.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
